info.title: sql-table-export
info.description: A .NET CLI tool to generate JSON from SQL Server tables and create SQL scripts for database schema and data migration. Supports flexible column mapping, data transformation, and transaction-safe migrations.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: SQL Data Exporter - Export and migrate SQL Server table data

commands.name: generate-json
commands.description: Export SQL Server table structure and data to JSON

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Data migration commands for importing JSON exports to SQL Server

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate INSERT SQL script from export JSON and migration config

commands.name: execute
commands.description: Execute INSERTs directly against a SQL Server database

commands.name: generate-sql
commands.description: Generate SQL script (CREATE TABLE + INSERT) from exported JSON data
